NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE; DECLARATION OF MARIAM GHAZARYAN; [PROPOSED] ORDER THEREON (TRANSACTION ID # 76831533) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARTEAGA, YESLI INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED HEARING SET FOR SEP-04-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO SEP-04-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF YESLI ARTEAGA INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. THE COURT STAYS THE BALANCE OF THE MATTER PURSUANT TO THE PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED REQUEST, SO THAT PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS MAY BE ARBITRATED. THE PARTIES MAY SEEK VACATUR OF CASE MANAGEMENT DATES DIRECTLY FROM DEPARTMENT 610, THE CASE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Class Claims Without Prejudice; Declaration Of Mariam Ghazaryan; [Proposed] Order Thereon
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF YESLI ARTEAGA INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Dismissal Of Class Claims Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for dismissal of class claims without prejudice is granted. The court stays the balance of the matter pursuant to the Plaintiff's unopposed request, so that Plaintiff's individual claims may be arbitrated. The parties may seek vacatur of case management dates directly from Department 610, the case management department.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Continued To Oct-15-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
